en: In those days a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that all the world should be registered.
zh: 那時，有諭旨從凱撒奧古士督頒發下來，叫普天下的人登記戶口。

en: This was the first registration when Quirinius was governor of Syria.
zh: 這是第一次戶口登記，是在居里紐作敘利亞總督的時候舉行的。

en: And all went to be registered, each to his own town.
zh: 眾人各歸各城去登記戶口。

en: And Joseph also went up from Galilee, from the town of Nazareth, to Judea, to the city of David, which is called Bethlehem, because he was of the house and lineage of David,
zh: 約瑟本是大衛家族的人，也從加利利的拿撒勒上猶太去，到了大衛的城伯利恆，

en: to be registered with Mary, his betrothed, who was with child.
zh: 與所聘之妻馬利亞一同登記戶口。那時馬利亞的身孕已經重了。

en: And while they were there, the time came for her to give birth.
zh: 他們在那裡的時候，馬利亞的產期到了，

en: And she gave birth to her firstborn son and wrapped him in swaddling cloths and laid him in a manger, because there was no place for them in the inn.
zh: 生了頭胎兒子，用布包著，放在馬槽裡，因為客店裡沒有地方。

en: And in the same region there were shepherds out in the field, keeping watch over their flock by night.
zh: 在伯利恆的郊外，有一些牧人在夜間看守羊群。

en: And an angel of the Lord appeared to them, and the glory of the Lord shone around them, and they were filled with fear.
zh: 主的一位使者站在他們旁邊，主的榮光四面照著他們，他們就非常害怕。

en: And the angel said to them, "Fear not, for behold, I bring you good news of a great joy that will be for all the people.
zh: 天使說：“不要怕！看哪！我報給你們大喜的信息，是關於萬民的：

en: For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.
zh: 今天在大衛的城裡，為你們生了救主，就是主基督。

en: And this will be a sign for you: you will find a baby wrapped in swaddling cloths and lying in a manger."
zh: 你們要找到一個嬰孩，包著布，臥在馬槽裡，那就是記號了。”

en: And suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God and saying,
zh: 忽然有一大隊天兵，同那天使一起讚美 神說：

en: "Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace among those with whom he is pleased!"
zh: “在至高之處，榮耀歸與 神！ 在地上，平安歸與他所喜悅的人！”

en: When the angels went away from them into heaven, the shepherds said to one another, "Let us go over to Bethlehem and see this thing that has happened, which the Lord has made known to us."
zh: 眾天使離開他們升天去了，那些牧人彼此說：“我們往伯利恆去，看看主所指示我們已經成就的事。”

en: And they went with haste and found Mary and Joseph, and the baby lying in a manger.
zh: 他們急忙去了，找到馬利亞、約瑟和那臥在馬槽裡的嬰孩。

en: And when they saw it, they made known the saying that had been told them concerning this child.
zh: 他們見過以後，就把天使對他們論這孩子的話傳開了。

en: And all who heard it wondered at what the shepherds told them.
zh: 聽見的人，都希奇牧人所說的事。

en: But Mary treasured up all these things, pondering them in her heart.
zh: 馬利亞把這一切放在心裡，反覆思想。

en: And the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, as it had been told them.
zh: 牧人因為聽見的和看見的，正像天使對他們所說的一樣，就回去了，把榮耀讚美歸與 神。

en: And at the end of eight days, when he was circumcised, he was called Jesus, the name given by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
zh: 滿了八天，替孩子行割禮的時候，就給他起名叫耶穌，就是他成胎之前，天使所起的。

en: And when the time came for their purification according to the Law of Moses, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord
zh: 滿了潔淨的日子，他們就按著摩西的律法，帶孩子上耶路撒冷去，奉獻給主。

en: (as it is written in the Law of the Lord, "Every male who first opens the womb shall be called holy to the Lord")
zh: 正如主的律法所記：“所有頭生的男孩，都當稱為聖歸給主。”

en: and to offer a sacrifice according to what is said in the Law of the Lord, "a pair of turtledoves, or two young pigeons."
zh: 又照著主的律法所說的獻上祭物，就是一對斑鳩或兩隻雛鴿。

en: Now there was a man in Jerusalem, whose name was Simeon, and this man was righteous and devout, waiting for the consolation of Israel, and the Holy Spirit was upon him.
zh: 在耶路撒冷有一個人，名叫西面，這人公義虔誠，一向期待以色列的安慰者來到，又有聖靈在他身上。

en: And it had been revealed to him by the Holy Spirit that he would not see death before he had seen the Lord's Christ.
zh: 聖靈啟示他，在死前必得見主所應許的基督，

en: And he came in the Spirit into the temple, and when the parents brought in the child Jesus, to do for him according to the custom of the Law,
zh: 他又受聖靈感動進了聖殿。那時，耶穌的父母抱著孩子進來，要按著律法的規矩為他行禮。

en: he took him up in his arms and blessed God and said,
zh: 西面就把他接到手上，稱頌 神說：

en: "Lord, now you are letting your servant depart in peace, according to your word;
zh: “主啊，現在照你的話， 釋放僕人平平安安地去吧！

en: for my eyes have seen your salvation
zh: 因我的眼睛已經看見你的救恩，

en: that you have prepared in the presence of all peoples,
zh: 就是你在萬民面前所預備的，

en: a light for revelation to the Gentiles, and for glory to your people Israel."
zh: 為要作外族人啟示的光， 和你民以色列的榮耀。”

en: And his father and his mother marveled at what was said about him.
zh: 他父母因論到他的這些話而希奇。

en: And Simeon blessed them and said to Mary his mother, "Behold, this child is appointed for the fall and rising of many in Israel, and for a sign that is opposed
zh: 西面給他們祝福，對他母親馬利亞說：“看哪！這孩子被立，要叫以色列中許多人跌倒，許多人興起，又要成為反對的目標，

en: (and a sword will pierce through your own soul also), so that thoughts from many hearts may be revealed."
zh: 這樣，許多人心中的意念就要被揭露出來。”

en: And there was a prophetess, Anna, the daughter of Phanuel, of the tribe of Asher. She was advanced in years, having lived with her husband seven years from when she was a virgin,
zh: 又有一個女先知，就是亞拿，是亞設支派法內利的女兒。她已經上了年紀，從童女出嫁，和丈夫住了七年，

en: and then as a widow until she was eighty-four. She did not depart from the temple, worshiping with fasting and prayer night and day.
zh: 就寡居了，直到八十四歲 。她沒有離開過聖殿，以禁食和禱告晝夜事奉主。

en: And coming up at that very hour she began to give thanks to God and to speak of him to all who were waiting for the redemption of Jerusalem.
zh: 就在那時候，她前來稱謝 神，並且向期待耶路撒冷蒙救贖的眾人，講論孩子的事。

en: And when they had performed everything according to the Law of the Lord, they returned into Galilee, to their own town of Nazareth.
zh: 他們按著主的律法辦完一切，就回加利利，到自己的城拿撒勒去了。

en: And the child grew and became strong, filled with wisdom. And the favor of God was upon him.
zh: 孩子漸漸長大，強壯起來，充滿智慧，有 神的恩典在他身上。

en: Now his parents went to Jerusalem every year at the Feast of the Passover.
zh: 每年逾越節，他父母都上耶路撒冷去。

en: And when he was twelve years old, they went up according to custom.
zh: 當他十二歲時，他們按著節期的慣例，照常上去。

en: And when the feast was ended, as they were returning, the boy Jesus stayed behind in Jerusalem. His parents did not know it,
zh: 過完了節，他們回去的時候，孩童耶穌仍留在耶路撒冷，他父母卻不知道，

en: but supposing him to be in the group they went a day's journey, but then they began to search for him among their relatives and acquaintances,
zh: 還以為他在同行的人中間。走了一天，就在親戚和熟人中找他，

en: and when they did not find him, they returned to Jerusalem, searching for him.
zh: 沒有找到，就轉回耶路撒冷找他。

en: After three days they found him in the temple, sitting among the teachers, listening to them and asking them questions.
zh: 過了三天，才發現他在聖殿裡，坐在教師中間，一面聽，一面問。

en: And all who heard him were amazed at his understanding and his answers.
zh: 所有聽見他的人，都希奇他的聰明和應對。

en: And when his parents saw him, they were astonished. And his mother said to him, "Son, why have you treated us so? Behold, your father and I have been searching for you in great distress."
zh: 他父母見了，非常驚奇，他母親說：“孩子，為甚麼這樣對待我們呢？你看，你父親和我都很擔心地在找你呢！”

en: And he said to them, "Why were you looking for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?"
zh: 他說：“為甚麼找我呢？你們不知道我必須在我父的家裡嗎？ ”

en: And they did not understand the saying that he spoke to them.
zh: 但他們不明白他所說的話。

en: And he went down with them and came to Nazareth and was submissive to them. And his mother treasured up all these things in her heart.
zh: 他就同他們下去，回到拿撒勒，並且順從他們。他母親把這一切事，都存在心裡。

en: And Jesus increased in wisdom and in stature and in favor with God and man.
zh: 耶穌的智慧和身量，以及 神和人對他的喜愛，都不斷增長。
